reference: I ended my period last Monday. The same day, I took an ovulation test, and it indicated that I would ovulate the next day. My partner and I had sexual intercourse that morning, so I know his sperm would have been viable. Today, six days later, I started to feel some cramping and noticed a brownish, bloody discharge. I have continued to monitor it, and now it is bright red and looks like a light to medium period. I have read that implantation bleeding is very light, so I am a bit concerned. Could this be implantation bleeding or something more serious? What should I do?
text: I ended my period last Monday. The same day, I took an ovulation test, and it indicated that I would ovulate the next day. My partner and I had sexual intercourse that morning, so I know his sperm would have been viable. Today, six days later, I started to feel some cramping and noticed a brownish, bloody discharge. I have continued to monitor it, and now it is bright red and looks like a light to medium period. I have read that implantation bleeding is very light, so I am a bit concerned. Could this be implant bleeding or something more serious? What should I do?
